since_last: 70% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.87%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.54% · BTC -2.63% · Gold +1.04% · Nasdaq100 +1.54%. 70% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.87%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.87%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +13.78%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +13.78%, AMBA +11.87%, AMD +9.74%, VRT +9.22%, ANET +8.28%. Laggards: AVAV -5.91%, INTU -3.47%, RXRX -3.42%, WDAY -3.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.10% at $163.78
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
